title: OELT Course Manifest
description: Schema for course.json — the single source of truth for an OELT course. Manifest model: 'structured shell, free body' (Decision 1, Option C). Structure and tracking are declared here; page content is free HTML referenced by `src`. Tracking semantics are Decision 2, Option 2 (declarative rules with a closed vocabulary).

oelt.description: Manifest schema version. Consumers MUST refuse a major version they do not understand. v0 manifests use "0.1".

id.description: Globally unique course identifier in reverse-DNS form (e.g. "com.bcl.data-privacy-101"). Used as the package/activity identifier across all targets.

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag for the course's primary language (e.g. "en", "en-GB", "fr-CA"). Required because it drives the document `lang` attribute, which is a WCAG 2.2 requirement.

targets.description: Distribution targets this course is built for. The packager produces one artifact per target from identical content.

theme.description: Optional path (relative to the manifest) to a CSS file that overrides the default `--oelt-*` design tokens.

structure.description: Ordered list of modules. Navigation and sequencing are derived from this tree.

identifier.description: An identifier unique within the course. Used as a DOM id and as the basis for target-specific identifiers, so it MUST be a valid HTML id token: start with a letter, then letters/digits/hyphen/underscore.

pages.description: Ordered list of pages within the module.

src.description: Path (relative to the manifest) to the page's HTML body file. Content is free HTML; OELT never describes it.

interactions.description: Optional declaration of the page's tracked interactions. Omit for untracked pages (graceful degradation to a structure-only manifest). The validator cross-checks that every declared interaction id exists in the page HTML.

interaction.description: A tracked interaction on a page. The contract that lets tracking config be machine-checkable without parsing creative HTML.

id.description: Interaction id. MUST match the `id` of an element in the page HTML.

type.description: The kind of interaction, for analytics and target mapping (e.g. "mcq", "quiz", "branching", "text-entry"). v0 does not constrain the vocabulary; the validator checks it against the element actually present.

weight.description: Relative weight when score.rule is "weighted-interactions". Defaults to 1.0. Ignored by other score rules.

required.description: Whether this interaction must be completed/passed for completion rules "required-interactions-completed" / "required-interactions-passed". Defaults to false.

tracking.description: Tracking rules. When absent, the course uses zero-config defaults: completion = all-pages-viewed, score = none, progress = pages-viewed (Decision 2, Option 1 as default).

threshold.description: Fraction of pages (0–1, exclusive of 0) that must be viewed. Only valid with rule "pages-viewed".

source.description: Id of the interaction that supplies the score. Required for, and only valid with, rule "single-interaction".

mastery.description: Pass threshold as a fraction (0–1). When set, the course reports passed/failed where the target supports it. Only valid with a rule that produces a score ("single-interaction" or "weighted-interactions").
